heroHeadline: El Guano Inner Circle in FGR Custody as Week of Maximum US Pressure Concludes; Infobae Documents 7 Career Evasions
heroSubtitle: 639 days since El Mayo's capture — Week of Apr 20–25: US escalation reaches peak (Apr 20: visa bans on 75 Sinaloa associates; Apr 24: OFAC sanctions 23-person fentanyl precursor network). Apr 22–23: Twin federal operations arrested 10 Gente del Guano including right-hand man 'Abel N', chief bodyguard, and financial operator — now in FGR custody in Culiacán — as El Guano evades for the 7th time in his career. El Mayo EDNY sentencing now scheduled May 18. Conflict homicides declining: March 2026 was lowest month since Sep 2024.
footerNote: Data sourced from Noroeste, Riodoce, Proceso, InSight Crime, Reuters, AP, Animal Político, ACLED, DEA, SEDENA, SEMAR, Al Jazeera, AFP, Infobae, La Jornada, CBC News, Excelsior, El Diario del Noroeste, White House ONDCP, DOJ, El Informador, El Imparcial, Latin Times, Zeta Tijuana, NBC Los Angeles, KTLA, Washington Times, NBC Chicago, UPI, US State Department, CNN, Washington Post, CBS News, Expansión Política, La Razón, El Financiero, Latinus, Ejecentral, El Diario de Chihuahua, NTD, Eurasia Review, Ground News, El Sol de Sinaloa
